email_subject_template: Application for DevOps Engineer | Yogendra Kumar | 9+ Years Experience
email_body_template:
Hi

Please find my attached resume for the DevOps Engineer position.

I have 9+ years of overall IT experience, including 5+ years of hands-on experience in Azure DevOps, Microsoft Azure, Terraform, CI/CD Pipelines, Infrastructure as Code (IaC), Jenkins, Git, Ansible, PowerShell, Bash, Azure Monitor, and Release Management.

I am currently available for an immediate opportunity and would appreciate the chance to discuss how my skills and experience can contribute to your organization.

Kindly review my profile and let me know if my experience matches your current requirements.

Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you.

Best Regards,
Yogendra Kumar
